zh.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall是Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302的女兒，出生。她於1235年與Osbert Cailly在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 馬辛加姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭諾福爾可希爾波洛，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可希爾波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall是Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302的女儿，出生。她于1235年与Osbert Cailly在英国英格兰諾福爾可格亞特 馬辛加姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰諾福爾可希爾波洛，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可希爾波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Tatteshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tattersall
meanings: English (Lancashire and west Yorkshire): habitational name from Tattershall in Lincolnshire, named from the Old English personal name Tāthere (genitive Tātheres) + Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall was born as the daughter of Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302. She married Osbert Cailly in 1235, in Great Massingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in Hilborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Hilborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall est née, fille de Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302. Elle a épousé Osbert Cailly en 1235, à Great Massingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée à Hilborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Hilborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall wurde, als Tochter von Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302 geboren. Sie hat 1235 in Great Massingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Osbert Cailly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb in Hilborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hilborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall è nata il come figlia di Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302. Lei sposato Osbert Cailly nel 1235, nel Great Massingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel Hilborough, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Hilborough, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Hilborough, Norfolk, England, United Kin: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒルボロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Emma TatteshallはRobert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302の娘として生まれた。1235年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト マシンガムでOsbert Caillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒルボロウで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒルボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall(은)는 Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 마징함에서 Osbert Cailly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 힐버루그h에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 힐버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall nasceu filha de Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302. Ela casou-se com Osbert Cailly em 1235, em Great Massingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em Hilborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Hilborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Emma Tatteshall родилась. Её отца звали Robert Tatershall , 2nd baron of Tattershall 1297-1302. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Osbert Cailly в 1235 г. в местности грит массингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в местности хилбороую, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности хилбороую, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
